titles.title: Lord Is There Room for Me?

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I wandered so far from my Father’s home, And in my world of sin sometimes felt so alone, It seems I heard a voice within saying to me: The Father will welcome you back to the family.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Lord is there room in your mansion for me? I know I was wrong, but now I’m so sorry, I want to come home, I want to come home; Lord Is there room In your mansion for me?

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: All those wasted years, can I ever repay? Can I make them up, Oh Lord some way? Then I heard Him say, as in the story of old: Welcome my child, back to the Father’s fold!
